title: Multiplex Labeling with Tyramide Fluorophores for Detecting CIAP-Resistant PSER129 and Proteinase K-Resistant aSyn in situ (Killinger 2024)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"146ou","text":"This protocol aims to examine the association of calf-intestinal alkaline phosphatase (CIAP)-resistant alpha-synuclein phosphorylated at serine 129 (PSER129) and proteinase K (PK)-resistant alpha-synuclein (aSyn) in the mouse brain, particularly in M83 transgenic mice treated with preformed fibrils. M83 lines exhibit a notably higher abundance of endogenous PSER129 compared to wild-type mice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Wash free-floating tissue (3 x 10 minutes) in dilution media (DM). Dilution media: %s %s
Wash free-floating tissue for 00:10:00 in dilution media (DM). (1/3)
Wash free-floating tissue for 00:10:00 in dilution media (DM). (2/3)
Wash free-floating tissue for 00:10:00 in dilution media (DM). (3/3)
Incubate the samples with 1% Triton X-100 in DM for 00:10:00 .
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 .
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer (2x10 minutes). CIAP buffer: %s %s
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash the tissues in CIAP buffer for 00:10:00 . (2/2)

Incubate the tissues with CIAP at a dilution of 1:333 for 24:00:00 at 37 °C on a shaker. Alkaline Phosphatase, Calf Intestinal (20 u/μl) Promega Catalog #M2825 . In 500uL CIAP buffer, add 1.5 μl CIAP (30 units).
Wash in DM (3 x 10 minutes).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (3/3)
Endogenous peroxidase inhibition and serum blocking step (1-hour incubation): 0.3% H 2 O 2 +0.1% Sodium Azide in 50 mL blocking buffer. Blocking buffer: %s %s

Dilute primary antibody in blocking buffer. Incubate Overnight at 4 °C . Recombinant Anti-Alpha-synuclein (phospho S129) antibody (EP1536Y, ab51253), dilution factor: 1:50K In 30 mL blocking buffer, add 0.6 µL PSER129 antibody.
Wash in DM (3 x 10 minutes).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (3/3)
HRP-Secondary antibody incubation 1:1000 dilution ( 01:00:00 ). Solvent is 100 mL DM + 1 mL normal serum + 1 g BSA
Wash in DM (2 x 10 minutes).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/2)
Wash in borate buffer for 00:10:00 . Borate buffer: %s %s
Incubate with tyramide fluorophore (TF) for 00:30:00 while blocking light. After this step, always protect the tissues from light. Components: %s %s
View under the microscope to confirm successful staining.
Heat water bath to 80 °C - 85 °C for 01:30:00 before the primary antibody elution step.
Place the dish containing sodium citrate buffer in the water bath and heat it for 00:10:00 . Sodium Citrate Buffer, pH 6.0 (1L): %s %s
Wash the tissues in sodium citrate buffer for 00:10:00
Incubate the tissues in the heated sodium citrate buffer for 00:30:00 .
Cool the dish containing tissues to Room temperature (at least 00:20:00 ).
Wash in DM for 10 min x 2 times.
Mount the tissues on Superfrost Plus Microscope Slides (Fisherbrand), and completely dry it for at least 02:00:00 .
Heat water bath to 37 °C for 00:30:00 before the PK digestion step.
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/2)
Place the dish containing PBS in the water bath and heat it for 00:10:00 . PBS: %s %s
Add the PK to the PBS at a dilution of 1:666 and mix well. Proteinase K Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EO0491 30 mL PBS, add 45 µL PK.
Incubate the mounted tissues in the PK containing PBS for 00:30:00 .
Wash the slide in PBS (2 x 5 minutes).
Incubate the slide in 4% PFA for 00:30:00 at Room temperature on a shaker.
Wash in DM (2 x 5 minutes).
Block the tissues on slide using Bloxall endogenous blocking solution (Vector Laboratories) for 00:10:00 at Room temperature on a shaker.
Wash the slide in PBS for 00:05:00 . (1/2)
Wash the slide in PBS for 00:05:00 . (2/2)
Wash in DM for 00:05:00 . (1/2)
Wash in DM for 00:05:00 . (2/2)

Dilute primary antibody in blocking buffer. Incubate Overnight at 4 °C . Recombinant Anti-Alpha-synuclein antibody (EPR20535, ab212184), dilution factor: 1:20K In 30 mL blocking buffer, add 1.5 µL aSyn antibody.
Wash in DM (3 x 10 minutes).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/3)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (3/3)
HRP-Secondary antibody incubation 1:1000 dilution ( 01:00:00 ). Solvent is 100 mL DM + 1 mL normal serum + 1 g BSA
Wash in DM (2 x 10 minutes).
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash in DM for 00:10:00 . (2/2)
Wash in borate buffer for 00:10:00 . Borate Buffer: %s %s
Incubate with tyramide fluorophore (TF) for 00:30:00 while blocking light.
Wash in DM (2 x 10 minutes). Wash in DM 00:10:00 . (1/2) Wash in DM 00:10:00 . (2/2)
View under the microscope to confirm successful staining.
Wash in PBS (2 x 10 minutes).
Wash in PBS for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash in PBS for 00:10:00 . (2/2)
Counterstain with DAPI for 00:20:00 at Room temperature . 1:2000 dilution in ddH 2 O or PBS.
Wash the tissues in PBS (2 x 10 minutes).
Cover the slide with Fluoroshield, and coverslip. Seal with nail polish on all sides of the coverslip. Always protect the slides from light. Slides can be stored at 4 °C .
Wash the tissues in PBS for 00:10:00 . (1/2)
Wash the tissues in PBS for 00:10:00 . (2/2)
Wash in DM (2 x 10 minutes).
Components: %s %s
